news.title:
Prabhudas Lilladher issues a Buy report on Kajaria Ceramics.
Kajaria Ceramics' current market price is Rs 990.2 as of April 1, 2026.
news.summary:
Prabhudas Lilladher issues a Buy report on Kajaria Ceramics.
Kajaria Ceramics' current market price is Rs 990.2 as of April 1, 2026.

news.title:
Kajaria Ceramics expects 7-8% YoY volume growth in Q4, aided by price hikes.
Morbi production cuts boost Kajaria’s market share; operating margins seen at 17-18% for FY26.
news.summary:
Kajaria Ceramics expects 7-8% YoY volume growth in Q4, aided by price hikes.
Morbi production cuts boost Kajaria’s market share; operating margins seen at 17-18% for FY26.

news.title:
Kajaria Ceramics acquires 10% additional stake in Kajaria Surfaces, making it a wholly owned subsidiary.
The Rs. 1.16 crore acquisition was a related-party transaction, approved by the audit committee.
news.summary:
Kajaria Ceramics acquires 10% additional stake in Kajaria Surfaces, making it a wholly owned subsidiary.
The Rs. 1.16 crore acquisition was a related-party transaction, approved by the audit committee.

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices impact consumer durables, plywood, pipes, and tiles sectors, causing cost inflation and margin concerns.
Amber Enterprises, Voltas, Blue Star, Havells, Greenply, Century Plyboards, Kajaria Ceramics, Cera Sanitaryware, Finolex, Astral, and Prince Pipes see stock declines since Feb 27.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices impact consumer durables, plywood, pipes, and tiles sectors, causing cost inflation and margin concerns.
Amber Enterprises, Voltas, Blue Star, Havells, Greenply, Century Plyboards, Kajaria Ceramics, Cera Sanitaryware, Finolex, Astral, and Prince Pipes see stock declines since Feb 27.

news.title:
Kajaria Ceramics appoints Siddharth Parida as CMO, effective March 25, 2026.
Parida, with 19 years' experience, previously led marketing at Goodyear Tires India.
news.summary:
Kajaria Ceramics appoints Siddharth Parida as CMO, effective March 25, 2026.
Parida, with 19 years' experience, previously led marketing at Goodyear Tires India.

news.title: Iran-Israel crisis impacts tile makers; Cera, Kajaria, Somany face challenges after a 26% slide.
news.summary: Iran-Israel crisis impacts tile makers; Cera, Kajaria, Somany face challenges after a 26% slide.

news.title:
Tile sector's Q4 FY26 outlook dims with export demand, margins impacted.
Domestic growth projected at 4-5% FY26, 5-6% FY27 despite US tariffs.
news.summary:
Tile sector's Q4 FY26 outlook dims with export demand, margins impacted.
Domestic growth projected at 4-5% FY26, 5-6% FY27 despite US tariffs.

news.title:
Jefferies retains Hold on Kajaria Ceramics; target ₹1,310 citing Middle East conflict risks impacting LNG supply.
Energy costs (~20–25% of sales) may rise, cutting EPS by ~5–7%; FY26 volume growth weak at ~1% YoY.
news.summary:
Jefferies retains Hold on Kajaria Ceramics; target ₹1,310 citing Middle East conflict risks impacting LNG supply.
Energy costs (~20–25% of sales) may rise, cutting EPS by ~5–7%; FY26 volume growth weak at ~1% YoY.

news.title:
Kajaria Ceramics acquired 2,500 shares (25%) of Kajaria Adhesive Pvt Ltd, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary.
The acquisition, a related party transaction worth Rs. 25,000, aligns with plans to manufacture tile adhesives in Tamil Nadu.
news.summary:
Kajaria Ceramics acquired 2,500 shares (25%) of Kajaria Adhesive Pvt Ltd, making it a wholly-owned subsidiary.
The acquisition, a related party transaction worth Rs. 25,000, aligns with plans to manufacture tile adhesives in Tamil Nadu.

news.title:
Promoters, DIIs, and FPIs raised stakes in Anand Rathi Wealth, Kajaria Ceramics, HEG, Ashapura Minechem, DCB Bank, Refex Industries, and Royal Orchid Hotels.
Anand Rathi Wealth showed strong returns; DCB Bank surged 36% in Q3 FY26 with 22% profit growth; other stocks had mixed performances.
news.summary:
Promoters, DIIs, and FPIs raised stakes in Anand Rathi Wealth, Kajaria Ceramics, HEG, Ashapura Minechem, DCB Bank, Refex Industries, and Royal Orchid Hotels.
Anand Rathi Wealth showed strong returns; DCB Bank surged 36% in Q3 FY26 with 22% profit growth; other stocks had mixed performances.

news.title:
Kajaria Ceramics' trading window closed since Dec 29, 2025, per insider trading rules.
Window reopens 48 hours post Q3 results announcement on Jan 30, 2026.
news.summary:
Kajaria Ceramics' trading window closed since Dec 29, 2025, per insider trading rules.
Window reopens 48 hours post Q3 results announcement on Jan 30, 2026.

news.title:
Kajaria Ceramics fully acquired Kajaria Adhesive and Kajaria Surfaces.
The acquisitions involved cash payments of Rs. 25,000 and Rs. 1.2 crore.
news.summary:
Kajaria Ceramics fully acquired Kajaria Adhesive and Kajaria Surfaces.
The acquisitions involved cash payments of Rs. 25,000 and Rs. 1.2 crore.

news.title: Kajaria Ceramics' Q3 consolidated net profit rose to ₹877M from ₹777M YoY.
news.summary: Kajaria Ceramics' Q3 consolidated net profit rose to ₹877M from ₹777M YoY.

news.title: HDFC Securities retains Reduce rating on Kajaria Ceramics with target price of 1160.
news.summary: HDFC Securities retains Reduce rating on Kajaria Ceramics with target price of 1160.

news.title: Kajaria Ceramics reassures investors about strong fundamentals and 150 Cr cost savings.
news.summary: Kajaria Ceramics reassures investors about strong fundamentals and 150 Cr cost savings.

news.title:
Kajaria Ceramics schedules investor call on Dec 22, 2025, to address fraud in its subsidiary.
Organized by Nuvama Wealth Management, the call will include senior management and starts at 11:00 AM IST.
news.summary:
Kajaria Ceramics schedules investor call on Dec 22, 2025, to address fraud in its subsidiary.
Organized by Nuvama Wealth Management, the call will include senior management and starts at 11:00 AM IST.

news.title: Kajaria Ceramics' CFO discovered a fraud worth ₹200M, raising integrity concerns.
news.summary: Kajaria Ceramics' CFO discovered a fraud worth ₹200M, raising integrity concerns.

news.title:
Kajaria Ceramics reports fraud in its step-down subsidiary, KBPL.
KBPL filed a police complaint and terminated Dilip Kumar Maliwal's service.
news.summary:
Kajaria Ceramics reports fraud in its step-down subsidiary, KBPL.
KBPL filed a police complaint and terminated Dilip Kumar Maliwal's service.

news.title:
Kajaria Ceramics reappointed Ashok Kajaria as Chairman for 5 years from Oct 1, 2025.
Chetan Kajaria named Vice Chairman and Rishi Kajaria as Managing Director for 5 years.
news.summary:
Kajaria Ceramics reappointed Ashok Kajaria as Chairman for 5 years from Oct 1, 2025.
Chetan Kajaria named Vice Chairman and Rishi Kajaria as Managing Director for 5 years.
